title: Timmins Roofing - RPW Contracting
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eric Philipow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_RGZfJoAkCeM5_JYUyKkkzXsXII6JATN0w7kH5dudMerz6A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Go elsewhere, just another contractor looking for quick cash at any expense.

- had to pester him to confirm a start date
- raised my quote while roof was already torn apart and hands were tied without consult, pictures or inspection
- charged me for plywood that went unused and left in the rain
- pesters you for payment endlessly the second they get off the roof
- leaves tools behind and never comes back
- said they would do a second building but vanished after payment for the first was made
- can’t even get a final bill provided to me for payments made","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tessa S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXg47J65kumUhN24ovfftzGXUF4ZAghaIKPON5SywlX9jDT0flj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called Ryan in an emergency situation. Many other contractors/companies said they were coming for a quote and I was left waiting around or they'd not want to work on the roof due to the steepness or they wanted to charge an arm and a leg due to it.
Ryan came for a quote within 24 hours and made arrangements to get my leaking roof rainproof within a few days before the forecasted rain.

Ryan made sure the job was done ASAP.  Communication was very thorough and clear throughout the process as I knew the roof was bad and there may have been unexpected issues. When something unexpected came up he communicated it with me right away and not after the work was done.

A neighbor had a minor complaint during the job and Ryan made sure to go above and beyond make it right for them without hesitation!

Highly recommend Ryan for any roofing needs.  His honesty and communication throughout the whole process was amazing!

Thanks for saving my roof Timmins roofing- RPW Contracting!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justin Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhf6VA4sIGXf2g89Uu7sxJAw3MIQddcU6UArng34t5m746iA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This contactor was hired to shingle my roof. He said it was a 2 or 3 day job and the job ended up going on for about 3 weeks and ended with little to no clean up. Not only did I pick up hundreds of nails around my driveway and yard but scrap peices of shingles are still on my roof, gutters and neighbors gutters. Part of the job was to remove an old steel chimney and I had to call him after it was shingled to come back and remove it. I don't like leaving bad reviews but I havnt had a bad experience with a contractor like this in a long time and feel like people should be warned. Overall it wasn't a good experience, I shouldve waited for the other contractor and it would've been  done by the same time without the headaches","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Mason","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJq3Kk23aHwd1CYGfAodF4rMRUSTJAQP0qX72nW7qS_Es1cSA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Timmins Roofing delivered, and then some!

They arrived exactly when they said they would, maintained a clean and organized worksite throughout the project, from start to finish, and were respectful of both our property and our time.

What truly stood out was the craftsmanship. Its already weathered a few heavy rains without issue! The attention to detail and the pride they clearly take in their work were very evident. Our new roof not only looks fantastic, but gives us complete peace of mind knowing it was done right.
I am extremely impressed and genuinely grateful for the service we received.
I would not hesitate to recommend Timmins Roofing to anyone looking for top-tier roofing solutions. A Big Thank You to the entire team for a job extremely well done!
